title: Thread
description: A Threads post (media object) on the Meta Threads platform.

media_product_type.description: Platform surface where the media is published. Always THREADS.

media_type.description: Type of media in the post.

permalink.description: Permanent URL link to the post. May be omitted if copyrighted material.

id.description: Instagram user ID who created the post.

username.description: Instagram username who created the post.

text.description: Text content of the Threads post.

media_url.description: Media URL for image or video posts.

is_quote_post.description: Whether this post is a quote of another user's post.

has_replies.description: Whether the post has any replies.

is_reply.description: Whether this media is a reply rather than a top-level post.

hide_status.description: Hide status of a reply post.

id.description: Media ID of the top-level post in the reply tree.
Media ID of the immediate parent of this reply.
